raw:
{
  "summary": "Gruber announces version 1.1 of bbdiff, a Perl script he wrote to invoke BBEdit's Find Differences command from the Mac OS X command line. The script bridges the command line and BBEdit via AppleScript, making it a Perl script that runs AppleScript under the hood. He notes a limitation: the script requires hard-coding the name of your BBEdit application, since AppleScript lacks a simple way to reference apps by creator code or bundle identifier. He takes a mild jab at the practic
